entry.title: Re: How to set default values ​​for application job param...
entry.content:
Hi Megumi, 

the function et_parameter_val in if_apj_dt_exec_object~get_parameters is correct, there seems to be a bug if the parameter values are displayed as blank. Please open a ticket on component BC-SRV-APS-APJ so we can check the issue. 

Best regards, 

Yasmina van Rooij

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content:
Hello Moderator

Have a issue with SAP Crossword, where for one of the question 15th

A useful component in SAP Build Apps under "Display" (10)

I see the answer is from the screen shot attaching from Build apps which is marked yellow, but the answer is showing as not correct. I see some of the people already completed this contest. But I have also cleared the cache and tried with different browser as well,  but the issue not fixed. 

Please let me know if any one faced such? and Any resolution for this to fix from backend.

Thanks

entry.title: Exported the Model did some changes, which is not reflecting when reuploaded.
entry.content:
I am using sap sac tenant. I took standard story from content network [ "Rapid Workforce planning" ], so they were using 2020,2021 and 2022 and did some chnages in dates like just on 2021 is 2023 and on 2023 is 2024. I exported that specific model in excel and make some changes i wanted in that model. Model name is "SAP__HR_IM_EC_WORKFORCE", when i was reimporting in overview of model i am showing the changes. when i use in story still same. I will add necessary screenshot as well. 

 

this is my updated model it is showing in Effective of period and date that changes are applied when but when i am expanding this column the sme dates are giving. and also wheen i apply on sotry filter for this specific column same 2020, 2021 and 2023 coming. 

what can be the solution for it?

entry.title: Recording SAP GUI Dropdown in Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi community, 

While recording a dropdown button like that in GUI - the button doesnt open the dropdown as in attached screenshot. Once the recording is off - the dropdown open normally and is visible. 

How can we record the click - opening of dropdown - and click on of the options so that we have it on record.

Thank you and habe a nice weekend! 🙂

Mira

entry.title: Re: Which Technology SSO implement
entry.content:
Hi,

please see an answer to your question in the following thread:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/which-technology-sso-implement/qaq-p/13799831

Best regards,

Martina

entry.title: Re: Based on value selected using F4 , disable another field
entry.content: Have You Got The Soliution?

entry.title: Re: How to change FIORI App Deploy Task Language in BAS
entry.content: It might be the default language on the user level as well. And if by any chance you use a technical user in the BTP destination you are using to deploy, of course you would check the language of such user.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content:
The moods 🙂 

#petoberfest #devtoberfest

entry.title: FOTV Stylesheet import
entry.content:
Dear All,

my stylesheet does not show any values, only the heading "TEST" shows up.

  • Transaction FOTV
  • Execute
  • In the menuSettings menu
  • Import stylesheet
  • Upload file ustva_2024 (the file comes from 3399546)

Via STRANS i see transformation FOT00012024DEEDCLXSLT is updated. However

  • FOTV
  • Click Show details of package button
  • Click Show detailed data formatted

Now a form appears, but there is no content altough we do have data, only the heading TEST CASE shows up.

Any idea which part is missing?

Many thanks,

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Unable to proceed on MDK Annotations
entry.content:
@ABMetallica 

With recent release of MDK editor, the original issue has been fixed. Please test again.

entry.title: Re: Issue during Deploy MDK App in the Dev Space
entry.content:
@Angelo_Ab 

With recent release of MDK editor, the original issue has been fixed. Please test again.

entry.title: JBR "duBAi "Call -''giRLs {'0524'1799'32'}(M-1| Jumeirah Villages "Call 'giRLs 'UAE
entry.content:
JBR "duBAi "Call -''giRLs {'0524179932'}(M-1| Jumeirah Villages "Call 'giRLs 'UAE or
A nutshell review for Hot "Call "Girl in 'Dubai . MY experience was superb with them this is the only recommended "Call "Girls 'service in 'Dubai "Call "Girls and again then 'Russian. so overall my practice was magnificent. The price is also moderate per hour. The plus point is the "Girl comes instantly to your lo"Cation doesn't matter you are in 'Bur ''Dubai or al 'Nahda or Dubai or any area 'she comes undeviatingly to your hotel room. Definitely recommend the "Call "Girls 'agency. A nutshell review for 'Hot "Call "Girls in 'Dubai .
MY experience was superb with them this is the only recommended "Call "Girls 'service in 'Dubai with verified "Call "Girls . I am using their 'services from past 6 months they never ever disappointed me in any way. Let's just say if i asked them to provide me 'russian "Call "Girls they fulfilled my request or even 'pakistani "Call "Girls or 'indian "Call "Girls in 'Dubai . They have their owen drivers who brings the "Call "Girls in less time in any area of 'Dubai like bur 'Dubai 'marina or 'jumeirah or even in 'jebel ali as well. I'm writing here everything after experience their 'services in all conditions.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: "Oh, really? Petoberfest again? You are going to stage once again some SAP stuff and take a picture? Ok, human, I'll allow... this time".

entry.title: Re: How to name elements in custom root entity in RAP dyn...
entry.content: Short answer: You can't. But... what do you mean by that? Please clarify what you are considering such option

entry.title: SAP ME2L
entry.content:
Hi, I am new here, first post, so please be gentle.

I have changed roles and now at a new company. I would like to change the view in the ME2L transaction. I am used to it looking like the first image where there are options to choose the field and save layouts etc but I am getting the view as per the second image.

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: CCM - Copy Multiple Contract at a time
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I have two questions.

1. I know there is a copy option for coping 1 to 1 contract. But is there any option in CCM apps or any program for coping multiple contracts at a time? If yes, then let me the SAP S4 Hana version also.

2. Is there any SAP standard report for CCM where I can see contract wise settlement and other details.

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

entry.title: Re: Production Order Child Item is another BoM's Parent I...
entry.content: But I want to use Child 1 under Parent 1 and need a calculation on Child 3 and Child 4.

entry.title: Re: Cleanup after migrating a system from Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello team,

we recommend you review provided content to disable first application configuration, then remove the system completely from SAP Solution Manager:

2531983 How to Decommission a System in Technical Monitoring in Solution Manager 7.1 & 7.2
1952567 How to remove no longer relevant managed systems from Solution Manager
3390615 How to Decommission Charm on Solution Manager
3042900 How to delete or deactivate Data Volume Management (DVM) related extractors for a managed system

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I'm Anh, from Vietnam.
I identify as a person in category of women. I have some experience in Logistics of manufacturing company. So I would like to upskill myself in SAP technology, that why I plan a target to get a SAP Certificate in Sales and Distribution for my career path.

Please consider my application and help me choose a suitable learning journey.

Thank you and best regards,

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi @SamiaBatool781782 ,

Thanks for writing! Are you a SF consultant?

I will send you an invite.

entry.title: how to add column in mdc table in sapui5 visual editor?
entry.content:
My task is to add column to existing app F3893 brutto worth but it seems when i'm trying to add one it cant see the fragment with implemented code. How can implement column? 

it's like sapui5 doesnt support mdc table. Waiting for your help

entry.content:
hi,

i added a custom field in append in RIHAFVR structure.

But when i launch transaction IW47 the field is not displayed in alv.

How can i display the field?

 

thank you

entry.title: Re: Synchronous goods receipt for Purchase orders in S4 HANA 2020 Embedded EWM
entry.content:
Hello Aslam,

The blog is helpful however without configuration part it is incomplete. if shared it would help to assess the error encountered.

Regards

Preeti.SS

entry.title: Post RE-FX Valuation without Controlling Object
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP Community,

I am faced with a unique requirement to post IFRS16 related expenses to P&L Accounts for which no Cost Elements are maintained in FI-CO. I am aware that this is against Best Practices and also imposes problems beyond the posting of contract valuations.
Can somebody here think about an approach to post to these expenses to these P&Ls without having to create the Cost Elements or the development of a customization?

Thank you all in advance.

Best Regards
Ben

entry.title: Re: Shipment Cost SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @johan-handoko 

You can refer to the documentation below where you can find relevant details

Transportation Management (TM) 

Also, you can go through the SAP course, where you can find more about this.

Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Transportation Management 

Thank You

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Understand the Clean Core Extensibility Options for Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hi Carine and André,

in ABAP Cloud, what's the recommended approach to implement parallel processing? The approach I'm familiar with, using RFCs, is still described in SAP Help for S/4HANA 2023 here:
https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/7bfe8cdcfbb040dcb6702dada8c3e2f0/4d909309eba36e73e10000000a15822b.html 

But in ABAP Cloud we can't call function modules, so what should we do instead?

thanks, Roger

entry.title: Re: Shipment Cost SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi Vivek, thank you, Yes I already found the source from SAP Course.

entry.title: Add co-product in 'Variable Heuristic' Product selection tab | RRP3 | ePP/DS | Product View |
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would appreciate your support for my query on Variable Heuristic execution in Product View. I am trying to add multiple products in the Variable heuristic setting for the heuristic SAP_PP_017 (planning of co-product). I have done all the necessary settings for co-product and my PDS is showing the correct relationship of main product and co-product, but somehow the heuristic does not show the co-product in the settings. Hence, I assumed that I need to add the product manually in the settings.

I had referred the blog Co-Products planning in PPDS but I could not see the other product in the product selection settings of the heuristic. 

kindly request your support here. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP: Is there any way to modify UI annotations vi...
entry.content:
Hi Matt,

Thanks for replying. Finally, I chose that approach. I declared virtual fields for each field and made the logic for them in a node.js event. I wonder if there is any better workaround for this, because its not very elegant as Im declaring a virtual field per normal field (I have a lot)...

entry.title: Re: CCM - Copy Multiple Contract at a time
entry.content:
Hi Arindam,

1. WB2R_EXTENSION

2. WB2R_AB_DOCS

Condition Contract Extension

Use

The report extends the selected condition contracts.

The extension is controlled by the parameters on the selection screen. For further information see their documentation.

Integration

Business volume base entries with validity are only taken over if the valid-to date was the final date of the contract. The validity restriction itself is not taken over.

Condition Types with the following condition usages are not taken over into the new contract:

  • Settlement Condition Adjustment
  • Other Contract Conditions (Adjustments)

Selection

Condition contracts with an extension calendar are always selected. Contracts without extension calendar are also selected if the extension relevance in the contract type settings of the process variant is set to independent of extension calendar.

entry.title: How to enable PO automatically send to vendor feature?
entry.content:
After creating the PO, it needs to be sent directly to the supplier. Ideally, the initial order should be sent automatically, and if there are any modifications to the order, the revised order can be manually sent by clicking in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to enable PO automatically send to vendor feature?
entry.content:
Dear user, 

what you have asked can be got with the output determination for Purchase order , this is detailed in several links which are copied bellow:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/1f58b66435ed4b15852fd934a644ba55.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=2408.500

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/ef2a4e332ba0803bdfb38670365f8aa7/71a801f6dc7a491c892c651d8cf99083.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=2408.500

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/d2055c526d9746879cb187abf88838fb.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=2408.500

 

Please follow the steps of the links

you will get the message output sent to supplier just after the PO approval.

thanks a lot 

Best regards 

Technical Support

entry.title: How to add CRUD operations to an ODataV2 in a Node based CAP app?
entry.content:
I am new to SAP CAP and I try to connect to an OData (API_BUSINESS_PARTNER) which provides data from our own system.

At the moment the whole app is readonly which works perfectly fine. But as soon as I try to add the possibility to edit fields of a business partner I get an error that the ressource "HasActiveEntity" is missing.

[remote] - Error: Error during request to remote service: Ressource für Segment 'HasActiveEntity' nicht gefunden
    at run (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\utils\client.js:238:31)
    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
    at async RemoteService.on_handler (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:274:20)
    at async next (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:69:17)
    at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:67:10)
    at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:286:16)
    at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:294:16)
    at async ApplicationService.<anonymous> (.\apisample\srv\external-service-bp.js:5:10)
    at async next (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:69:17)
    at async ApplicationService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:67:10) {
  statusCode: 502,
  reason: AxiosError: Request failed with status code 404
      at settle (.\apisample\node_modules\axios\dist\node\axios.cjs:2019:12)
      at IncomingMessage.handleStreamEnd (.\apisample\node_modules\axios\dist\node\axios.cjs:3135:11)
      at IncomingMessage.emit (node:events:529:35)
      at endReadableNT (node:internal/streams/readable:1400:12)
      at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:82:21)
      at Axios.request (.\apisample\node_modules\axios\dist\node\axios.cjs:4287:41)
      at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
      at async run (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\utils\client.js:227:16)
      at async RemoteService.on_handler (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:274:20)
      at async next (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:69:17)
      at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:67:10)
      at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:286:16)
      at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:294:16)
      at async ApplicationService.<anonymous> (.\apisample\srv\external-service-bp.js:5:10)
      at async next (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:69:17) {
    message: "Error during request to remote service: Ressource für Segment 'HasActiveEntity' nicht gefunden",
    code: 'ERR_BAD_REQUEST',
    config: {
      timeout: 0,
      xsrfCookieName: 'XSRF-TOKEN',
      xsrfHeaderName: 'X-XSRF-TOKEN',
      maxContentLength: -1,
      maxBodyLength: -1,
      method: 'get',
      baseURL: 'https://myXXXXXX-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER',
      proxy: false,
      url: '/A_BusinessPartner?$select=BusinessPartner,BusinessPartnerName,CreatedByUser,FirstName,HasActiveEntity,IsActiveEntity,LastName,TradingPartner&$orderby=BusinessPartner%20asc&$filter=(IsActiveEntity%20eq%20false%20or%20SiblingEntity%2FIsActiveEntity%20eq%20null)&$inlinecount=allpages&$top=30',
      data: undefined
    },
    request: {
      method: 'GET',
      url: 'https://myXXXXXX-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner?$select=BusinessPartner,BusinessPartnerName,CreatedByUser,FirstName,HasActiveEntity,IsActiveEntity,LastName,TradingPartner&$orderby=BusinessPartner%20asc&$filter=(IsActiveEntity%20eq%20false%20or%20SiblingEntity%2FIsActiveEntity%20eq%20null)&$inlinecount=allpages&$top=30',  
      headers: [Object [AxiosHeaders]]
    },
    response: {
      status: 404,
      statusText: 'Not Found',
      headers: [Object [AxiosHeaders]],
      body: [Object]
    },
    status: 404,
    toJSON: [Function (anonymous)]
  }
}
[cds] - Error: Error during request to remote service: Ressource für Segment 'HasActiveEntity' nicht gefunden
    at run (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\utils\client.js:238:31)
    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
    at async RemoteService.on_handler (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:274:20)
    at async next (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:69:17)
    at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:67:10)
    at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:286:16)
    at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:294:16)
    at async ApplicationService.<anonymous> (.\apisample\srv\external-service-bp.js:5:10)
    at async next (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:69:17)
    at async ApplicationService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:67:10) {
  statusCode: 502,
  reason: AxiosError: Request failed with status code 404
      at settle (.\apisample\node_modules\axios\dist\node\axios.cjs:2019:12)
      at IncomingMessage.handleStreamEnd (.\apisample\node_modules\axios\dist\node\axios.cjs:3135:11)
      at IncomingMessage.emit (node:events:529:35)
      at endReadableNT (node:internal/streams/readable:1400:12)
      at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:82:21)
      at Axios.request (.\apisample\node_modules\axios\dist\node\axios.cjs:4287:41)
      at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
      at async run (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\utils\client.js:227:16)
      at async RemoteService.on_handler (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:274:20)
      at async next (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:69:17)
      at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:67:10)
      at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:286:16)
      at async RemoteService.handle (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\libx\_runtime\remote\Service.js:294:16)
      at async ApplicationService.<anonymous> (.\apisample\srv\external-service-bp.js:5:10)
      at async next (.\apisample\node_modules\@sap\cds\lib\srv\srv-dispatch.js:69:17) {
    message: "Error during request to remote service: Ressource für Segment 'HasActiveEntity' nicht gefunden",
    code: 'ERR_BAD_REQUEST',
    config: {
      timeout: 0,
      xsrfCookieName: 'XSRF-TOKEN',
      xsrfHeaderName: 'X-XSRF-TOKEN',
      maxContentLength: -1,
      maxBodyLength: -1,
      method: 'get',
      baseURL: 'https://myXXXXXX-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER',
      proxy: false,
      url: '/A_BusinessPartner?$select=BusinessPartner,BusinessPartnerName,CreatedByUser,FirstName,HasActiveEntity,IsActiveEntity,LastName,TradingPartner&$orderby=BusinessPartner%20asc&$filter=(IsActiveEntity%20eq%20false%20or%20SiblingEntity%2FIsActiveEntity%20eq%20null)&$inlinecount=allpages&$top=30',
      data: undefined
    },
    request: {
      method: 'GET',
      url: 'https://myXXXXXX-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner?$select=BusinessPartner,BusinessPartnerName,CreatedByUser,FirstName,HasActiveEntity,IsActiveEntity,LastName,TradingPartner&$orderby=BusinessPartner%20asc&$filter=(IsActiveEntity%20eq%20false%20or%20SiblingEntity%2FIsActiveEntity%20eq%20null)&$inlinecount=allpages&$top=30',  
      headers: [Object [AxiosHeaders]]
    },
    response: {
      status: 404,
      statusText: 'Not Found',
      headers: [Object [AxiosHeaders]],
      body: [Object]
    },
    status: 404,
    toJSON: [Function (anonymous)]
  }
}
[error] - 502 > {
  code: '502',
  message: "Error during request to remote service: Ressource für Segment 'HasActiveEntity' nicht gefunden"
}

This is external-service-bp.cds where I intended to use @odata.draft.enabled

using {cap.apitest as api} from '../db/schema';

service BusinessPartnerService {
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity BusinessPartners as
        projection on api.BusinessPartners {
            *
        }
}

 This is external-service-bp.js

module.exports = async service => {
	const BusinessPartnerService = await cds.connect.to("API_BUSINESS_PARTNER");

	service.on("READ", "BusinessPartners", async context => {
		return await BusinessPartnerService.run(context.query);
	});
};

 This is schema.cds which makes it possible to use the entitySet in the Fiori-App

using {API_BUSINESS_PARTNER} from '../srv/external/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER';

namespace cap.apitest;

entity BusinessPartners      as
  projection on API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.A_BusinessPartner {
    *
  };

 This is fiori-service.cds where I adjust the UI

using {BusinessPartnerService} from '../../srv/external-service-bp.cds';

annotate BusinessPartnerService.BusinessPartners with @(
    UI          : {
        SelectionFields: [
            BusinessPartner,
            BusinessPartnerName
        ],
        LineItem       : [
            {Value: BusinessPartner},
            {Value: BusinessPartnerName},
            {Value: FirstName},
            {Value: LastName},
            {Value: CreatedByUser},
            {Value: TradingPartner}
        ],
        Facets         : [{
            $Type : 'UI.ReferenceFacet',
            Label : '{i18n>GeneralInformation}',
            Target: '@UI.Identification'
        }],
        Identification : [
            {Value: BusinessPartner},
            {Value: BusinessPartnerName},
            {Value: FirstName},
            {Value: LastName},
            {Value: BusinessPartnerFullName},
            {Value: OrganizationBPName1},
            {Value: OrganizationBPName2},
            {Value: OrganizationBPName3},
            {Value: OrganizationBPName4},
            {Value: OrganizationFoundationDate},
            {Value: OrganizationLiquidationDate}
        ],
        HeaderInfo     : {
            TypeName      : '{i18n>TypeName}',
            TypeNamePlural: '{i18n>TypeNamePlural}',
            Title         : {Value: BusinessPartnerName},
            Description   : {Value: OrganizationBPName1}
        },
        DeleteHidden   : true,
        UpdateHidden   : false
    },
    Capabilities: {
        UpdateRestrictions: {Updatable: true},
        Updatable         : true
    }
);

annotate BusinessPartnerService.BusinessPartnersAlias with @(
    UI          : {
        SelectionFields: [
            BusinessPartner,
            BPAliasPositionNumber
        ],
        LineItem       : [
            {Value: BusinessPartner},
            {Value: BPAliasPositionNumber},
            {Value: BusinessPartnerAliasName}
        ],
        Facets         : [{
            $Type : 'UI.ReferenceFacet',
            Label : '{i18n>GeneralInformation}',
            Target: '@UI.Identification'
        }],
        Identification : [
            {Value: BusinessPartner},
            {Value: BPAliasPositionNumber},
            {Value: BusinessPartnerAliasName}
        ],
        HeaderInfo     : {
            TypeName      : '{i18n>TypeName}',
            TypeNamePlural: '{i18n>TypeNamePlural}',
            Title         : {Value: BusinessPartner},
            Description   : {Value: BusinessPartnerAliasName}
        },
        DeleteHidden   : true,
        UpdateHidden   : false
    },
    Capabilities: {
        UpdateRestrictions: {Updatable: true},
        Updatable         : true
    }
);

 I hope I provided all necessary information to help you help me. I can't find a proper solution to access CRUD operations for a ODataV2 Service. I also tried using @Rizing/cds-extension, but gave up after I found out that the latest version of @sap/cds makes it unusable.

Do I have a chance to have an Edit Button in the Details View of a Business Partner?

entry.title: Free Goods Determination not getting determined in Sales Order - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Free Goods is not getting determined in Sales Order. I've enabled Free Goods Determination and free goods condition record, However, Free Goods is not getting determined in Sales Order. 

Free Goods Determination

sales Order

 

In Assign Item Categories configuration, there is no option to include Free Goods Item category with usage Free option.

Could you please advise is there any option to determine Free Goods Item for Configurable item in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: How to increase timeout in powershell script while invoking BTP iflow using Invoke-WebRequest?
entry.content:
Hi All,
I am using PowerShell script Invoke-WebRequest command to trigger an SAP BTP iFlow. When the iflow processes quickly (less than 2 minutes), the PowerShell script receives the correct status. However, if the iflow takes longer than 2 minutes, even though you've set a timeout of 1 hour, the script fails with a "Termination Error (Invoke-webRequest): The connection closed Unexpectedly" message

Thanks 
Himanshu

entry.title: Re: KNVK Custom extractor not able to identify delta records
entry.content: Hi @nachtaktiv, agree but BDCP2 has limited set of data compared to CDHDR and CDPOS. my question reading from this kind of hefty tables can effect the extraction time?

entry.title: Fiori standard application similar to transaction FB70 and FB60
entry.content: I would like to understand if there is a dedicated service within the Fiori app that handles transactions similar to FB70 (customer invoice) and FB60 (vendor invoice), including tax calculation as part of the posting process. Any suggestions would be highly appreciated

entry.title: How can I print a check after issuing it using the 'Post Outgoing Check' title?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

I am experiencing an issue with cheque printing in SAP Public Cloud 2408 using the "Manage Outgoing Cheque" functionality. Below is a detailed description of the steps I followed:

  1. I made a payment to a vendor using the "Post Outgoing Payment" title.
  2. After that, I manually created a cheque through the "Manage Outgoing Cheque" functionality.

However, after creating the cheque, I am unable to find any option to print the cheque.

Could you please investigate this issue and provide a solution or guidance on how to print cheque in Sap?

Looking forward to your prompt assistance.

entry.title: Use Purchase Scheduling agreements LU with outbound deliveries
entry.content:
Hi: My customer wants to use the Scheduling agreement type LU for Stock transport Scheduling agreements. Still, we didn't find the configuration path related to the agreement type LU and the delivery type NL and without that assignment it is not possible to take out the inventory from EWM, do you mind please let us know if it is possible to use this function with Outbound deliveries in public cloud, thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Use Purchase Scheduling agreements LU with outbound d...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Creating a Stock Transport Scheduling Agreement

When you create a stock transport scheduling agreement, you can schedule the exact delivery dates for a stock transfer.

  1. From the Purchasing menu, select Outline Agreement  Scheduling Agreement  Create  Stock Transport Scheduling Agreement.

  2. Enter the necessary data. The agreement type LU is defined in the standard system. The item category must be U . Enter the validity end date.

    You will find a table of the possible combinations of order type and item category under Stock Transfer Using a Stock Transport Order .

  3. Save the scheduling agreement.

  4. Enter the delivery schedule for the scheduling agreement by choosing Outline Agreement  Scheduling Agreement  Delivery Schedule  Maintain .

For more details you can refer to the below link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/91b21005dded4984bcccf4a69ae1300c/0f62bd534f22b44ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

Stock Transport Scheduling Agreement - SAP Community

 

Thanks and Regards

SAP SUPPORT

entry.title: Re: Issue during Deploy MDK App in the Dev Space
entry.content: Hi @Jitendra_Kansal, how I can verify that is all up to date ? I tried some minutes ago, but the problem persists.

entry.title: Re: Planning Data from ACDOCP to ACDOCU Group Reporting
entry.content: But when we check the box, and save it, an error is displayed with message delete Source of group currency. so how to configure in which currency will data flow from ACDOCP to ACDOCU.

entry.content:
Hi,

Can this localization be done using SAP BTP tools, instead of Cloud Application Studio?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: Rambo has expressed a keen interest in becoming a developer from a very young age

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content: You are definitely on the right track, and perhaps my instructions were not clear. Just like a crossword, enter the answer without spaces or punctuation. Does that help?

entry.title: Re: Add co-product in 'Variable Heuristic' Product select...
entry.content: Sorry Gurus, after posting the question I found the solution. Actually, my co-product was lacking the demand and hence the heuristic was not showing it in the selection. Issue is resolved now.

entry.title: Re: Friends helping friends solve the SAP Crossword Puzzle
entry.content:
There is no limit to the number of times you can answer the tutorial ... I gave an answer in your other post, to enter without the space ... let me know if you more help. 

By the way, you can do the puzzle until the end of Devtoberfest, another month

entry.title: Maximum number of line items reached in entry view (999) - Activate Entry View Summarization
entry.content:
Hello,

While trying to post an invoice we encountered an issue with error message "Maximum number of line items reached in entry view.

Long text of error 

NA F5727

Maximum number of items reached in entry view (long text)

Diagnosis

The maximum number of items in the entry view of a journal entry ('') has been exceeded.

System Response

Entry views in a journal entry have a three-digit item counter that restricts the number.

Procedure

If the documents come from previous applications (Sales and Distribution, Materials Management, Order Settlement, and so on), you can - and should - set summarization of the entry views or even complete suppression of the update of the entry views in Accounting. To do this, go to self-service configuration UI 106716 "Activate Summarization of Entry View". Also read the explanatory help text there.

 

The error message from system is suggesting to activate "Summarization of Entry View" configuration.

Could you please advise on all the potential downsides of this setting, if any? Such as:
- Will some information from postings be lost
- On which level the summarization is performed (which criteria from the line item has to be the same in order for system to summarize it in one line item, and is this criteria something we can additionally modify per our requirements, through standard customizing or through some BADI?)
- Any other downsides/issues that can occur

 

Thanks and regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Maximum number of line items reached in entry view (9...
entry.content:
See help.sap.com documentation on Entry View Summarization

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/3a295f45d9354aa09418530288fc166c.html?locale=en-US

As referenced therein 

"Note: No data is lost if you activate this summarization option. All the information is kept in full detail in the ledger view of the journal entry."

Review documentation in full.

see referenced also in documentation note 3404001 - Local Versions Supported for Entry View Summarization

If you use one (or several) of the following local versions only, you can activate the 'Entry View Summarization' without restrictions

entry.title: Failed to create HDI container on database because of: SAP DBTech JDBC: [1891]
entry.content:
I am trying to deploy a CAP project and upon deploying I encountered an error regarding the hdi creation.

I can' find an article about this, is there anyone who is familiar with the missing privilege?

 

Thank you!

#SAPHana #SAPHANACloud

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Understand the Clean Core Extensibility Options for Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hi,

you can use cl_abap_parallel class to implement parallel processing in ABAP Cloud. Refer to the following blog post.

ABAP Cloud - Parallel processing (software-heroes.com)

entry.title: Possibility to log time deviations in Work Center POD
entry.content:
Hi DM experts, is there any plan for the future to record time deviations in POD with the corresponding deviation reason codes, as in transaction CO11n, in relation to scheduled operation start/end dates?

Best regards Gizem

entry.title: not able to navigate to the supplier data from produts in fiori elements list report page
entry.content:
i am using northwind odata service for the fiori elements now how to navigate from products to suppliers in list report page in visual studio code 

and then when i click the navigation bar it will display like

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: I am a construction engineer by education, and my story with SAP began recently when I started working as a construction manager. I learned about SAP a year ago and in February 24 I passed the SAP MM and SAP SD exams. I live in Berlin but I was born in Poland. I'm trying to find a job in Berlin as a SAP Advisor and specialize in data migration. I also had an interview at BMW, but they said that they were looking for a person who knew how to migrate data from SAP to S/4HANA. I would like to specialize in data migration from SAP to S/4HANA, but in the form of a temporary contract. I would like to find a boot for the automatic migration of approximately 12,000-13,000 pieces of data within a short period of time. I am looking for an internship as a junior SAP advisor and I would like to cooperate with someone who specializes in data migration. I know that this time for migration is supposed to end in 2027. I wish everyone a nice day.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI with Secure Login Service - sap shortcut file...

Hi Brian,

please open a customer ticket and the colleagues in the SAP Support team will be able to help you.

Best regards,

Martina

entry.content:

Is that information somewhere?

Thansk

Manuel

entry.title: Re: SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI enterprise rollout
entry.content:
Hi Raghu,

please open a customer ticket and the colleagues in the SAP Support team will be able to help you.

Best regards,

Martina

entry.title: Building custom Excel view in SAPUI5 : Technical Part 3
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

This is part 3 of the blog series and focus of this blog will be on making tables editable, option to add new worksheets and applying CSS to change look and feel of it. 

Check out Part 1 and Part 2-  before jumping to this blog.

After completing Part 1 and 2, we were able to achieve file upload, data parsing and generate tabs, tables dynamically, Tabs at bottom, basic toolbar and Borders.

Ok, this looks good enough for start.

But, It should be editable at least !! 

    Excel is Editable, right?

    It allows to Create new tabs.

    Too much space around cells, remove that.

 

lets try to add these features.

1. Make tables Editable

Earlier, while generating tables when file gets uploaded, we set sap.m.Label to display headers and sap.m.Text to display data.

Instead of Labels and Text, Use sap.m.Input to make it editable. That's all is needed !! 

Replace existing code with below snippet. ( for reference I have commented out old code and below it, placed new code ) 

Function to be edited is "generateTablewithTabsxlsx" which was created in Part 1 of this blog series.

 

 

generateTablewithTabsxlsx: function () {
... old code ...
// loop over all worksheets stored in below array
// for each worksheet => add a table
//                       for each table => add columns and Cells
$.each(aTabs, function (i, val) {
    oTable = new Table({
        fixedLayout: false,
        backgroundDesign: Solid,
        showNoData: true
    });
    var oModelData = oModel.getProperty("/" + val + "/");
    var aColumns = Object.keys(oModelData[0]);
    var oColumnNames = [];
    $.each(aColumns, function (i, value) {
        oColumnNames.push({
            Text: aColumns[i]
        });
    });
    var header = that.getView().getModel("header");
    header.setProperty("/" + val + "/", oColumnNames);
    var oTemplate = new Column({
        // --------- old code commented ---------------
        // header: new Label({
        //     text: "{header>Text}",
        //     customData: [
        //         new CustomData({
        //             key: "colName",
        //             value: "{header>Text}",
        //             writeToDom: true
        //         })
        //     ],
        // })
        // --------- below is the New code snippet ---------------
        header: new Input({
            value: "{header>Text}",
            customData: [
                new CustomData({
                    key: "colName",
                    value: "{header>Text}",
                    writeToDom: true
                })
            ],
        })
    });

    oTable.bindAggregation("columns", "header>/" + val + "/", oTemplate);
    var oItemTemplate = new ColumnListItem();


    $.each(aColumns, function (j, value) {
        var oHeaderName = value;
        // --------- Old code commented out ---------------
        // oItemTemplate.addCell(new Text({
        //     text: "{data>" + oHeaderName + "}"
        // }));
        // --------- below is the New code snippet ---------------
        oItemTemplate.addCell(new Input({
            value: "{data>" + oHeaderName + "}"
        }));
    });
    oTable.bindAggregation("items", {
        path: "data>/" + val + "/",
        template: oItemTemplate
    });


    // Add IconTabFilter for the current worksheet 
    // add the table, created in current loop, as content of IconTabFilter 
    oITB.addItem(
        new IconTabFilter({
            text: val,
            content: new ScrollContainer({
                height: "350px",
                vertical: true,
                content: oTable
            })
        })
    );

});

... old code ...
}

 

 

 

It should look like this..

Add custom CSS to hide boxes and underline effect of Input control.

 

 

.sapMInputBaseContentWrapper:not(.sapMInputBaseReadonlyWrapper):not(.sapMInputBaseContentWrapperState)
{
    box-shadow: none;
}

.sapMInputBaseContentWrapper{
    background: none;
}

 

 

After that, it should look like ..

Table looks good but what happend to the Combobox ?

Digression over overriding UI5 standard class 

If you look at Combo Box at top closely, it is transparent now. CSS has affected other UI5 controls as well.

Whenever custom CSS style or effect is needed, make sure to add a custom class or an ID to the control and restrict CSS style to that control only.

Since all dynamically generated content is inside IconTabBar and it has a custom class, apply it to Custom CSS styling to restrict it to UI5 contols contained by IconTabBar.

 

 

<IconTabBar id="id_itb" class="excel">

 

 

 

Custom CSS restricted to Icon Tab Bar. To do so, CSS Combinators are used.

Check out more details about CSS Combinators here. 

Specific Controls which are descendents of a control with class "excel". ( just add space after .excel )

 

 

.excel .sapMListTblCell {
    border-left: 1px solid #ccc;
}

.excel .sapMInputBaseContentWrapper:not(.sapMInputBaseReadonlyWrapper):not(.sapMInputBaseContentWrapperState)
{
    box-shadow: none;
}

.excel .sapMInputBaseContentWrapper{
    background: none;
}

 

 

 

after that, it should look like ..

Now, no custom style is applied on Combobox ( cause it is not in scope of .excel class )
 

2. While scrolling, Headers should stick to top

 

 

generateTablewithTabsxlsx: function () {
... old code as it is ...
oTable = new sap.m.Table({
    fixedLayout: false,
    backgroundDesign: sap.m.BackgroundDesign.Solid,
    sticky : [sap.m.Sticky.HeaderToolbar,
              sap.m.Sticky.InfoToolbar,
              sap.m.Sticky.ColumnHeaders],
    showNoData: true
});
... old code as it is ...
}

 

 

 

This will make sure that while scrolling content, header sticks to the top.

It should look like this..

Header ( First Row ) is sticky and is not moving while scrolling.

 

Optional : If you don't want extra padding that is applied to all cells, add below styles in CSS file.

 

 

.excel .sapMColumnHeader,

.excel .sapMListTblCell,

.excel .sapMListTblHighlightCol+.sapMListTblHeaderCell,

.excel .sapMListTblHighlightCell+.sapMListTblCell,

.sapUiSizeCompact .excel .sapMListTblHighlightCol+.sapMListTblCell.sapMListTblHeaderCell

{
padding: 0;
}

 

 

 

and it would look like..

 

3. Option to create Tabs

update old code to add dummy entry at the end of all worksheets with "+" sign.

 

 

generateTablewithTabsxlsx: function () {

    .. old code as it is..

    // loop over all worksheets stored in below array
    // for each worksheet => add a table
    //                       for each table => add columns and Cells
    $.each(aTabs, function (i, val) {
    .. old code as it is ..
    });

    // ---------- new code below ----------
    // dummy entry at end of actual worksheets 
    oITB.addItem(
        new IconTabFilter({
            text: "+",
            key: "+"                                                
        })
    );

},

 

 

 

Add new function onClickNew as below. This will create and insert new empty worksheet tabs when "+" is clicked.

 

 

onClickNew: function(oEvent){
    debugger;
    
    var sKey = oEvent.getParameters().key;
    var oITB = that.getView().byId("id_itb");
    var sLen = oITB.getItems().length;
    
    if (sKey == "+") {                    
        if(!that.counter){
            that.counter = 0;
        }
        that.counter += 1;
        // do not expand
        // add new filter bar before current position
        oITB.insertItem(
            new IconTabFilter({
                text: "New Tab",
                key: that.counter,
                content: new ScrollContainer({
                    height: "350px",
                    vertical: true,
                    content: new Text({
                        text : "hi"
                    })
                })
            })
            , sLen - 1);
        oITB.setSelectedKey(that.counter);
        

    }
}

 

 

Make sure to add "select" event handler "onClickNew" for the IconTabBar defined in the View.

Whenever any of the IconTabFilters inside IconTabBar is clicked, select event is fired. 

 

.. old code as it is ..
<IconTabBar id="id_itb" class="excel" select="onClickNew">
.. old code as it is ..

 

 

It should look like..

 

Add below code to add an empty table when new worksheet is added. 

 

 

onClickNew: function (oEvent) {

var oModel = that.getView().getModel("data");
var aWorkSheet = oModel.oData;

var sKey = oEvent.getParameters().key;
var oITB = that.getView().byId("id_itb");
var sLen = oITB.getItems().length;

if (sKey == "+") {
    if (!that.counter) {
    that.counter = 0;
    }
    that.counter += 1;
    var sNewWorksheet = that.counter;
    aWorkSheet[sNewWorksheet] = [
    {
        column1: "",
        column2: "",
        column3: "",
        column4: "",
        column5: "",
    },
    {
        column1: "",
        column2: "",
        column3: "",
        column4: "",
        column5: "",
    },
    {
        column1: "",
        column2: "",
        column3: "",
        column4: "",
        column5: "",
    },
    {
        column1: "",
        column2: "",
        column3: "",
        column4: "",
        column5: "",
    },
    ];

    var val = that.counter;
    var oTable = new Table({
    fixedLayout: false,
    backgroundDesign: Solid,
    sticky: [
        HeaderToolbar,
        InfoToolbar,
        ColumnHeaders,
    ],
    showNoData: true,
    });
    var oModelData = oModel.getProperty("/" + val + "/");
    var aColumns = Object.keys(oModelData[0]);
    var oColumnNames = [];
    $.each(aColumns, function (i, value) {
    oColumnNames.push({
        Text: aColumns[i],
    });
    });
    var header = that.getView().getModel("header");
    header.setProperty("/" + val + "/", oColumnNames);
    var oTemplate = new Column({
    header: new Input({
        value: "{header>Text}",
        customData: [
        new CustomData({
            key: "colName",
            value: "{header>Text}",
            writeToDom: true,
        }),
        ],
    }),
    });

    oTable.bindAggregation("columns", "header>/" + val + "/", oTemplate);
    var oItemTemplate = new ColumnListItem();

    $.each(aColumns, function (j, value) {
    var oHeaderName = value;
    oItemTemplate.addCell(
        new Input({
        value: "{data>" + oHeaderName + "}",
        })
    );
    });
    oTable.bindAggregation("items", {
    path: "data>/" + val + "/",
    template: oItemTemplate,
    });

    // add new filter bar before current position
    oITB.insertItem(
    new IconTabFilter({
        text: "New Tab",
        key: that.counter,
        content: new ScrollContainer({
        height: "350px",
        vertical: true,
        content: oTable,
        }),
    }),
    sLen - 1
    );

    // set selected key to newly created tab
    oITB.setSelectedKey(that.counter);
}
},

 

 

It should look like this..

Thank you for going though the entire blog. 

Will publish next blog soon on exporting all tabs as worksheets of single EXCEL file. 

Stay tuned for upcoming blogs on more features enhancement to this app.

entry.title: Re: How to Install SAP Cloud Connector on a Mac M2 Processor
entry.content:
Hi @Nkrish,

       Yes, I also get the same error and it got fixed after running the following command at my terminal console - "export NO_CHECK=1" 

I hope it helps!

Regards - Satya

entry.title: Re: Scheluding exam problem
entry.content:
Hi @berk_abay 
Thank you for sharing this update.
I am glad that this issue is solved.
Please always feel free to post your questions about learning journeys, certification preparation, and how you can reach your learning goals in this group
Last but not least I wish you success for the upcoming exams.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: ABAP Test Cockpit in the Cloud – How to use baseline
entry.content:
Hi @SylvainA ,

baseline is based on the ATC check results of the ATC runs (not on single objects or findings). You can take ATC check results (based on the projects in Custom Code Migration app) into baseline. An ATC check result which was added to the baseline will not be deleted. If you want to work on the findings of the ATC check run, you can remove it from the baseline, it is again handled like any result.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: While cat sitting at a friend, the cat does not want to work...

entry.title: Re: KNVK Custom extractor not able to identify delta records
entry.content:
if you select properly from CDHDR+CDPOS with key fields, table name and date
this should lead to a faster+smaller result than loading all customer-contacts in full

entry.title: SAP SYSTEM ARCHIVAL CONFIGURATION - SARA #ATR
entry.content:
#ATR (25)
 
Hello Basis folks, Sharing my blog article.

SAP SYSTEM ARCHIVAL CONFIGURATION - SARA

CHECKPOINTS:
1) Table Information
2) Archival Prerequisite Checks
3) Archiving Configuration
INFO - Archival Trail Run Methods
4) Archival Run
5) Post Archival Checks
6) Archival – Read Retrieval Check
 
Post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/ajaytr66_atr-activity-7245386395563794432-iDJA?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop 
 
Article Link: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cQIjtmCR1m5pqKsTE4z6yMUYwoZqVrTT/view 
PASS: ATR
😊

entry.title: HCM - PA30 & PA40 Automation / CCM Workflow
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

HCM Integration is Active. BP BUPA sync also active. Employee also created through Maintain Employee app. But personnel no not created for all employees. As a result, we are unable to create teams & responsibility.

I found two programs SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_FROM_EMPL & SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE

After running these programs, only those employees for which personnel no already available showing in list and we can create team.

But there is a problem, employee id showing twice in the list and also how can I create personnel no automatically without using PA30 & PA40

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Release News 2408 – External Entities
entry.content:
Hi @ali-kaplan,

the ABAP Keyword Documentation for external entities will be published with 2411 and the link will be pasted then. 

The delivery was delayed, sorry for any inconveniences caused.

Best

Andrea

entry.title: Re: Variant Table - Line not valid
entry.content:
Hi,

I agree, the display in CU60 is not optimal. You could switch to using PMEVC. The "contents" tab does not show deleted lines at all, you see those only in the "change overview" tab.

Best regards

Conrad Drescher (AVC team)

entry.title: Re: AR & AP Regrouping in SAP (S/4 HANA Finance)
entry.content:
Hi  Shakeel,

My business  would expect a reclass from receivables to payables only when a customer on a net basis shows a credit value  or vendor on net basis  shows a  debit value.  Is this functionality available 

Our testing shows that  Customer with credit balance and vendor with Debit balance are reclassified with ref to groups at assignment level. During the process system checks individual transaction both in customer and vendor ledger and groups it at assignment field as debit/ credit eligible to be reclassified. can  grouping at assignment field can be avoided ? System should just check the ent balance and sane should be reclassified 

Pankaj

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the Sao Paulo Group - Bem vindos ao Grupo de Sao Paulo
entry.content:
Bom dia Jorge,

Acredito que você esteja se referindo ao SAP Learning Hub, que disponibiliza cursos próprios da SAP e seus valores.
Segue o endereço: https://www.sap.com/training-certification/learning-hub.html

No entanto, acredito que as escolas informadas acima, sejam bem mais acessíveis financeiramente, mesmo tendo valores altos.
Eu mesma fiz uma academia de PP na Ka Solutions. Com o curso, você "ganha" a possibilidades de fazer a prova de certificação em 2 tentativas, porém adianto que no mundo SAP, ter a certificação não é tão importante quando a experiência em projetos.

Neste link (https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys?page=1), consegui fazer alguns cursos gratuitos da SAP, mas não disponibilizam certificados ao final.

Te desejo muito sucesso!

entry.title: Re: Teamplate for Variant configuration identifiers?
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP does not offer such a functionality. I think there are still several partners offering such tools, all with varying functionality. You should be able to find those e.g. by going through the presentations of the CWG conference (which you can find on the CWG website). Sorry, I don't have the names of the partners at hand.

Best regards

Conrad Drescher (AVC team)

entry.title: Re: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content: Append the field in the structure of the ALV internal table.

entry.title: Re: EWM - Scan any Pick-HU in the WO
entry.content: Hi Joao, we are facing the same issue? Have you already found a solution?

entry.title: Re: Let's ask for a change in the "draw signature" component
entry.content: Is there no voting on bug-tracker / feature roadmap anymore?

entry.title: Re: Is there an Internal Order field available in S4HANA...
entry.content:
Internal orders are not available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition we suggest to use WBS insteads to control account assignments under Enterprise Projects.

The deprecation occured in 1902 (Feb 2019) changing them for Project Controls. You can see information here: https://me.sap.com/notes/2853554/E

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I’m Azaan, and I hold a bachelor's degree in AI. I gained some valuable experience in SAP through an internship, which further fueled my interest in the field. I believe SAP Analytics Cloud is an excellent platform for diving into data science and analytics. I’m excited for this journey and looking forward to earning some certifications in SAP Analytics Cloud as well!

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound Scenario - Pick in multiple HUs for a single WO
entry.content: Hi Tanaya, we have the same problem on our project. Have you already found a solution?

entry.title: Re: BRIM-The subscriber account "00000*****" (with "BRIM"...
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

We connected S4HANA 2023 initial shipment to CC 2022. We tried replicating the contract (via ODI).

  • Getting the same error again. BRIM-The subscriber account "00000*****" (with "BRIM" as service provider) is not valid.
  • Maintained Web service : CO_FKKCC_SUBSCRIBER_ACCOUNT  (not a CO_FKKCCV1_SUBSCRIBER_ACCOUNT)
  • CC - Service User has a specific catalogue which is expected as it works before. I guess "all catalogue" is not required.
  • Web Service URL's are working for the same service for *SUAC as tested in SOAP successfully.

What are other areas might have missed causing this error ??

Thank You.

Rahul.

entry.title: Re: IAS as central user management system
entry.content:
Hi, 

If you manually delete a user in IAS, the next IPS job will replicate the user to IAS. Once you configure Azure as a corporate IdP, you need to manage your users in Azure. 

For the user delete scenario in Azure, you can add transformation logic to map the 'accountEnabled' flag from Azure to the 'Inactive' flag in IAS. However, the BTP shadow user will still exist.

Rrgards,

Bhagya

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hi there!

I am a Software Engineering graduate now looking to dive into the world of SAP. Keenly interested in SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst - SAP Analytics Cloud.

I kindly request a voucher as a token of appreciation for completing the SAP learning journey in "Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud" and "Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning."

This voucher would greatly assist me both financially and motivationally, helping to advance my career and ultimately benefiting SAP as well.

Sincerely,

Owais Hasan

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
I am a recent Software Engineering graduate, eager to expand my expertise in SAP, with a particular focus on becoming an SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst in SAP Analytics Cloud.

Having successfully completed the learning journeys for "Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud" and "Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning," I am now seeking to further enhance my skills and knowledge.

As a gesture of support for this next step, I kindly request a voucher to assist with the certification process. This would not only alleviate financial constraints but also motivate me to continue advancing in this field. I am confident that this will enable me to contribute meaningfully to the SAP community.

Thank you for considering my request, and I look forward to your positive response.

Sincerely,
Eisha Anwar

Owais Hasan

entry.title: Re: Free Goods Determination not getting determined in Sa...
entry.content:
Hello @thangarajthomas 

As per the standard, if you want to use the free goods determination process, certain business conditions need to be met:

  • The material must be available in stock.
  • If you are using trading goods, you can directly procure the material

Additionally, from a configuration perspective, the item category determination for free goods is based on usage and the higher-level item category, which cannot be edited in the current version.

Ideally, free goods are not applicable for make-to-order products. 

However, it would be great if you could explain your business requirement.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: Lite Task Management for SAP Projects with CHARM
entry.content:
Hi Oded Dagan,

Thank you, very helpful!

--Abay

entry.title: Re: Message no.AA347 You cannot post to asset in compa. c...
entry.content:
Hi 

please follow the method; 

Easy Access - Accounting - Financial Accounting - Fixed Assets - Periodic Processing - Year-End Closing - FAA_CMP - Execute/Undo 

- select your company code

- then under 0L Double click 

- Press edit button 

- change year  ( putt current year)

- go to save  

 

if you can't make a change year please use SM12 Tcode then repeat  follow my steps 

if you have any doubt feel free to contact my LinkedIn page 

www.linkedin.com/in/mohammed-aseeb-s-16ba1a191

entry.title: How to restrict JNL delivery document in open billing documents list for intra-state STO process
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise on the option to restrict JNL delivery document in the open billing documents list for Intra-State STO process in India. .

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

In India, for STO transactions within state (Intra-State - same region code for plant and customer ), there is no requirement to create billing document. 

However for Inter-state STO transactions (different region code for plant and customer), billing document is required. 

Our requirement is to restrict JNL delivery document (for Intra-state) in VF04 billing due list. 

Could you please advise if there is any BaDI or any other enhancement option available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud,  to enable this restriction based on same region code for Plant & customer.

VF04 - Maintain Billing Due List

Please advise. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Integration of SAP CI(BTP IS) with Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Farooq,

I am trying above blog using Datasphere trail version, I am struck with JDBC Data source, JDBC URL. 

Can you please let me know where to find host name and construct JDBC URL.

My Datasphere trail version, home page Home - SAP Datasphere (ondemand.com)

Thanks & Regards,

Nagendra

entry.title: Re: Disable search restriction in certain situation
entry.content: what is the need to use local view? If disable and enable restriction directly without using local view, is there any issues?
